data.current_description: Generate a beautiful code screenshot by passing code and styling configuration.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate a code screenshot from source code
data.description_suggestion: Generates a beautiful code screenshot image by processing the provided source code and styling configuration. Accepts code content and styling options (theme, language, colors, etc.) via SimpleSnapRequest. Returns the generated screenshot image. Requires bearer token authentication (paid plan users only). The operation processes the input synchronously and returns the image resource.
